response.justification: Bogdan is an excellent senior engineer with strong software fundamentals and 20 years of experience, but lacks the mandatory requirements for this role. He has only ~6 months of C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) versus the required 5-10 years, no demonstrated Windows platform development, and critically, zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or financial services domains. His career has focused on web and modern software stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, Linux/cloud), making this a fundamental skill and domain mismatch despite his overall seniority.
strengths: Senior engineer with 20 years of professional experience and proven ability to work at scale across multiple technologies and platforms
Excellent communication and mentoring demonstrated through multiple technical workshops, conference talks, and open-source project leadership
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with TDD, CI/CD, testing discipline, and cross-platform development breadth
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented C++ experience (National Instruments 2014-2015) versus required 5-10 years of professional hands-on Windows C++ development
Zero capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain exposure when domain expertise is explicitly mandatory for the role
Career trajectory focused entirely on web and modern technology stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, Linux, Kubernetes, AWS) rather than systems programming or financial software platforms

key_factors.factor: Strong senior-level software fundamentals and mentoring
